'''pofafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labile|labile]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-f-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labile|labile]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| pofafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pofafithi|pofafithi]] || [[word:pofafiji|pofafiji]] || [[word:pofafishi|pofafishi]] || [[word:pofafiki|pofafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pofafuthuthu|pofafuthuthu]] || [[word:pofafujuju|pofafujuju]] || [[word:pofafushushu|pofafushushu]] || [[word:pofafukuku|pofafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pofafuthu|pofafuthu]] || [[word:pofafuju|pofafuju]] || [[word:pofafushu|pofafushu]] || [[word:pofafuku|pofafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pofafufthuf|pofafufthuf]] || [[word:pofafufjuf|pofafufjuf]] || [[word:pofafufshuf|pofafufshuf]] || [[word:pofafufkuf|pofafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pofafethe|pofafethe]] || [[word:pofafeje|pofafeje]] || [[word:pofafeshe|pofafeshe]] || [[word:pofafeke|pofafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pofafothotho|pofafothotho]] || [[word:pofafojojo|pofafojojo]] || [[word:pofafoshosho|pofafoshosho]] || [[word:pofafokoko|pofafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pofafotho|pofafotho]] || [[word:pofafojo|pofafojo]] || [[word:pofafosho|pofafosho]] || [[word:pofafoko|pofafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pofafofthof|pofafofthof]] || [[word:pofafofjof|pofafofjof]] || [[word:pofafofshof|pofafofshof]] || [[word:pofafofkof|pofafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:pofafÃŸfthÃŸf|pofafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:pofafÃŸfjÃŸf|pofafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:pofafÃŸfshÃŸf|pofafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:pofafÃŸfkÃŸf|pofafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:pofafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|pofafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:pofafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|pofafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:pofafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|pofafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:pofafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|pofafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:pofafÃŸfthÃŸf|pofafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:pofafÃŸfjÃŸf|pofafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:pofafÃŸfshÃŸf|pofafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:pofafÃŸfkÃŸf|pofafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:pofafÃŸfthÃŸf|pofafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:pofafÃŸfjÃŸf|pofafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:pofafÃŸfshÃŸf|pofafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:pofafÃŸfkÃŸf|pofafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pofafÃḊthÃḊ|pofafÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:pofafÃḊjÃḊ|pofafÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:pofafÃḊshÃḊ|pofafÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:pofafÃḊkÃḊ|pofafÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pofafathatha|pofafathatha]] || [[word:pofafajaja|pofafajaja]] || [[word:pofafashasha|pofafashasha]] || [[word:pofafakaka|pofafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pofafatha|pofafatha]] || [[word:pofafaja|pofafaja]] || [[word:pofafasha|pofafasha]] || [[word:pofafaka|pofafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pofafafthaf|pofafafthaf]] || [[word:pofafafjaf|pofafafjaf]] || [[word:pofafafshaf|pofafafshaf]] || [[word:pofafafkaf|pofafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:pofafasha|pofafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:pofafshÃḋsha|pofafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pofafrosha|pofafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pofafmusha|pofafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:pofafyasha|pofafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopofafnkshÃḋsha|gopofafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopofafnkrosha|gopofafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopofafnkmusha|gopofafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopofafnkyasha|gopofafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:pofafafasha|pofafafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pofafafshÃḋsha|pofafafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pofafafrosha|pofafafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pofafafmusha|pofafafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pofafafyasha|pofafafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopofafafnkshÃḋsha|gopofafafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopofafafnkrosha|gopofafafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopofafafnkmusha|gopofafafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopofafafnkyasha|gopofafafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:pefÃḊfasha|pefÃḊfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pefÃḊfshÃḋsha|pefÃḊfshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pefÃḊfrosha|pefÃḊfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pefÃḊfmusha|pefÃḊfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pefÃḊfyasha|pefÃḊfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopefÃḊfnkshÃḋsha|gopefÃḊfnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopefÃḊfnkrosha|gopefÃḊfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopefÃḊfnkmusha|gopefÃḊfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopefÃḊfnkyasha|gopefÃḊfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:pofafasha|pofafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pofafshÃḋsha|pofafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pofafrosha|pofafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pofafmusha|pofafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pofafyasha|pofafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopofafnkshÃḋsha|gopofafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopofafnkrosha|gopofafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopofafnkmusha|gopofafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopofafnkyasha|gopofafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
